classification: as-declared by the platform; deterministic audit; LLM line-item classifier DEFERRED (F1b)
assumedPurchasePriceBase: order item subtotal before discounts, excluding tax and tip (ASSUMED — U1 unresolved)

findings.plainLine: Across the month, delivery fees came to 18.0% of order value — over the 15% limit even on the monthly average. It's not a violation yet — the platform still has until 2026-07-30 to refund the excess. (Depends on the still-open definition of "purchase price", U1.)
findings.professionalLine: Delivery fees total $7.20 on $40.00 of monthly purchases = 18.0% vs the 15% cap (NYC-563.3-a-2); over-cap under the ASSUMED base "order item subtotal before discounts, excluding tax and tip (ASSUMED — U1 unresolved)" — PROVISIONAL (U1); conditional — pending the 30-day refund window (closes 2026-07-30).
